title: Epic: Batch requests, RefPlus, and JMAP Quotas
description:
Why: IMPROVEMENTS.md §12 describes three JMAP protocol integrations that improve client ergonomics and correctness: RefPlus (reduces round trips by chaining results within one request), Quotas (storage limit visibility), and JMAP Metadata (per-object annotations).

What:
- Structured multi-method batch call helper in client.rs (build JmapRequest with multiple invocations)
- RefPlus (urn:ietf:params:jmap:refplus): when session advertises it, chain Message creation + Message/query in one round trip
- JMAP Quota support: Quota/get to display storage usage; warn when approaching limits
- JMAP Metadata (optional): per-chat color tags, per-message bookmarks via metadata annotations
- Tests: fixture-based batch request/response round-trip
close_reason: Implemented JmapRequestBuilder, call_batch, ResultReference, Session::supports_refplus/quotas, Quota type, quota_get(); all tests pass
